prompt:
A clean configuration binder page clipped to a board beside a small cluster of single-board computers in soft focus, showing a schematic-style layout for pinned package lists, reboot window, and log rotation. The page contains structured blocks and toggles but all text is intentionally illegible and generic.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a near-future homelab aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, tidy cabling, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Center the config page so it reads clearly as “cluster config documentation.”
